question.label: Gap awareness
question.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
question.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

answer: I want to lead one cross-team decision this cycle, end to end.

assessment.note: She names a specific forward goal to lead one cross-team decision end to end, showing ambition and some clarity, but not a wellbeing signal. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'lead one cross-team decision' could be drilled next session.

new_queue.label: Leverage choices
new_queue.name: Where do you choose to go deep instead of pulling others in earlier?

new_queue.label: Next-step commitment
new_queue.name: What would raising your visibility look like in the next two weeks?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 7)

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I get work done, yet I am not consistently shaping decisions early.
Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.
I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.
That slows trust because stakeholders feel surprised late.
I need a tighter narrative on tradeoffs, not just stronger models.
I want to lead one cross-team decision this cycle, end to end.
